description: Triggers for analyzing job descriptions, scoring fit, and extracting requirements

queries.query: Analyze this job description and score my fit based on my resume
Extract the must-have vs nice-to-have requirements from this JD
What is this company really looking for between the lines in this job posting?
Score my match for this senior engineer role based on the requirements
Analyze this job posting and tell me what gaps I have to address
Break down this marketing director JD into priorities and red flags
What skills from this job description do I not have on my resume?
Decode this vague job description — what are they actually looking for?
Analyze the culture signals in this job posting
Tell me if I should apply to this job based on my experience vs the requirements
Write a cover letter for this role
Tailor my resume to match this job description
Prepare me for the interview at this company
Compare these two job offers I received
What salary should I ask for at this company?
Optimize my LinkedIn for this type of role
Write a reference list for my job applications
Research this company before my interview
Format my resume for this application
Translate my experience into language that matches this industry
